title: Anadelphia arrecta
taxonomy: Anadelphia arrecta is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Panicoideae and tribe Andropogoneae. The genus Anadelphia is a part of the subfamily Panicoideae and is closely related to other grasses in the same subfamily. Anadelphia arrecta is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Africa. This species is part of the monocot order Liliopsida.
